flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at SUNY Downstate Health Sciences University are 1% below 6-year earnings ($110.7k → $109.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at SUNY Downstate Health Sciences University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at SUNY Downstate Health Sciences University are 88% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($109.6k vs $58.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at SUNY Downstate Health Sciences University rose 52% between 2021 and 2024 (193 → 293).
